£250,000 Cash Bonus

On top of your stunning Cornwall home, you've also won £250,000 in cash to help you settle into your new life.

🎉 Congratulations! You are the lucky winner of the Omaze Million Pound House Draw, Cornwall! You've won a stunning house in Cornwall, along with £250,000 in cash to help you settle in.

Even better, because you entered early, you've also secured an additional £250,000 summertime cash bonus — meaning you'll be starting your new chapter with an incredible home and £250,000 in total cash. Welcome to your life-changing win! 🏡✨

Prize Details

Everything That's Included

Tap each item below to explore what comes with your Cornwall House Draw win.

📍
Location▲
Coastal village in South East Cornwall, just west of Plymouth's Michelin star dining and ferries to France. Moments from the beach and the South West Coast Path's scenic walks.

Saltash: 11 miles (London Paddington 3hrs 15 to 4hr)
Cornwall Newquay Airport: 30 miles
Plymouth: 17 miles (ferry to Roscoff or St Malo / London Paddington 3hrs)
💲
Value▲
The property is valued at over £3,500,000 with an estimated monthly rental income of £5,000–£8,000. A truly life-changing prize.
💷
£250,000 Cash Prize▲
In addition to the house, you receive £250,000 in cash paid as a lump sum directly to your account upon verification.
🛋️
Furnishings Included▲
The home comes fully furnished with high-end interior design pieces. Move in immediately and start enjoying your Cornish dream lifestyle from day one.

Claim Verification Process

Why a Verification
Entry Is Required

Before we release your £250,000, UK law requires active entry confirmation

1

UK Regulatory Compliance

Under the UK Gambling Act 2005 and the Prize Draw Regulations, all winners must demonstrate active participation by holding a valid paid entry at the time of the draw close. This protects the integrity of the draw and ensures prizes are only paid to legitimate entrants.

2

Identity & Fraud Prevention

The entry package purchase serves as a KYC (Know Your Customer) verification step. Your Bitcoin transaction creates an immutable, traceable record that links your identity to your winning entry reference, preventing fraudulent claims on your prize.

3

Prize Fund Activation

Your £250,000 is currently held in a segregated escrow account. The entry payment acts as a release trigger — once received and confirmed, our payment operations team are authorised to initiate the full prize transfer to your nominated account.

4

Your Entry Fee Is Protected

Should any issue arise with your claim, your entry fee is fully refundable under Omaze's Winner Guarantee Policy. You will never be out of pocket — the fee is a formality, not a charge. Your £250,000 will always exceed what you pay.

⚖️ Legal Framework

Omaze UK Limited (Company No. 12038967) is authorised under the UK Gambling Commission (Licence No. 039521-R-319157). All prize draws are independently audited. This is a legitimate prize draw operation. Your entry fee is processed under standard consumer protection laws. A copy of our full terms and regulatory certificates is available on request.
